arts.ttl: Pogba drops MAJOR transfer hint amid Man Utd links
arts.sum: Pogba drops MAJOR transfer hint amid Man Utd links Juventus mutually terminated Pogba’s contract in November 2024 and the 32-year-old has been linked with a number of clubs in recent months, including Manchester United .

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim explains why Manuel Ugarte recalled to Manchester United XI vs Leicester
arts.sum: Manuel Ugarte is back in the Man United starting line-up for Sunday night's Premier League clash with Leicester City.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils 'make stunning offer' for Barcelona superstar ahead of summer market
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly put a £59m offer on the table for Barcelona attacker Raphinha, who has been in stunning form this season.

arts.ttl: Leicester v Man Utd team news: Onana starts, Zirkzee benched
arts.sum: United make three alterations for tonight’s game The post Leicester v Man Utd team news: Onana starts, Zirkzee benched appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Leicester v Manchester United: Premier League updates – live
arts.sum: Minute-by-minute coverage from the 7pm (GMT) kick-off Email Tim with your views on the action Manchester United come into this game with an unfamiliar feeling. They can look back on their last performance with great satisfaction. Against Real Sociedad on Thursday, they weren’t flawless (until the 87th minute, they led only by virtue of some over-zealous refereeing), but by the end they were dominant. And the word “electrified” was even used. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: 'I Spent Twelve Years at Manchester United - Ralf Rangnick Humiliated Me'
arts.sum: Former Manchester United defender Phil Jones once felt humiliated by interim boss Ralf Rangnick.

arts.ttl: Leicester vs. Man United: Andre Onana, Mason Mount decisions made as Red Devils confirm XI for King Power battle
arts.sum: Manchester United goalkeeper Andre Onana is passed fit for Sunday's Premier League clash against Leicester City at the King Power Stadium.

arts.ttl: Leicester City team news v Man United as Ruud van Nistelrooy stays true to his word
arts.sum: City (5-2-1-2): Hermansen; Justin, Faes, Coady, Thomas, Kristiansen; Ndidi, Soumare; El Khannouss; Daka, Vardy. With no changes made, City’s defence will again see Wout Faes, Conor Coady and Luke Thomas for the heart of the back-line, with James Justin and Victor Kristiansen as wing-backs.

arts.ttl: Leicester vs Manchester United - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Foxes name an unchanged XI from defeat at Chelsea, while Ruben Amorim makes three changes from his side that beat Real Sociedad
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Leicester City host Manchester United at the King Power Stadium in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Gyokeres responds to Man Utd links after coach's 'replaceable' message
arts.sum: Viktor Gyokeres insists that he has yet to be contacted over a summer transfer and that he remains fully focused on Sporting CP . Gyokeres responds to Man Utd links after coach's 'replaceable' message
